name: ADM ENDEAVORS, INC.
business: ADM Endeavors, through its subsidiary Just Right Products, operates a diverse vertical integrated business selling promotional products, uniforms, and related services including screen printing, embroidery, digital production, and import wholesale. The company sells to businesses, schools, municipalities, and government entities. It has a government-specific division and serves clients with employee uniforms and promotional items.

exposures.sentence: Just Right Products has operated a diverse vertical integrated business, which consists of a retail sales division, screen print promotions, embroidery production, digital production, import wholesale sourcing, and uniforms.
Our new facility should allow us to add a fulfilment center that will enhance service to existing customers and attract larger customers that require fulfillment.
The school uniform industry is undergoing a great deal of uncertainty due to tariffs and related international trade policies.

catalysts.event: Start operations at new corporate headquarters
catalysts.sentence: We hope to start operating out of the new facility by the end of the first quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: US promotional products industry annual revenues over $23 billion with growth over 3% per year
tamClaims.sentence: According to Promotional Products Association International (PPAI), in the past five years the United States promotional products industry expanded greatly, with annual revenues of over $23 billion and growth of over 3% per year, the industry employs over 250,000 people in over 26,000 businesses.
